These votes count just as much as those from early voters. Both parties and campaigns have had officials observing the count in OC and LA. I am grateful to the election workers who continue to do their essential work in the face of lies, hostility, and bomb threats. (3/4)
My team will monitor this process closely through the coming days and weeks. (4/4)

I am so thankful to all those who continue to support our campaign as we count the remaining votes in #CA45. Over 10,000 lawfully cast ballots are outstanding, and we owe it to every Californian to ensure their voice is heard. 🧵 (1/4)

Here's why it takes a while to count in California:
‣ CA lets voters register to vote on election day. Their voter registration needs to be verified before their votes are counted.
‣ CA accepts vote-by-mail ballots up to a week after the election as long as they are postmarked
Great to see Republicans and Democrats coming together to support our dedicated election workers. Together, we will make sure that every vote is counted.

If you are in line at a vote center by 8 pm, stay in line. You can cast your vote after polls close because you were in line before the vote center closed.

Every vote matters. Every vote deserves to be counted.
